About Me

A recent medical graduate from the University of Jordan with strong academic preparation and extensive clinical exposure through hospital rotations in major specialties including internal medicine, surgery, pediatrics, obstetrics & gynecology, and emergency medicine. Highly motivated to develop clinical competence, improve patient care skills, and pursue postgraduate residency training. Passionate about evidence-based medicine, accurate diagnosis, and delivering high-quality healthcare services.

My Work

⚡ Clinical Case Management

Participated in supervised patient care during hospital rotations including assessment, diagnosis, and treatment planning.

⚡ Hands-on Clinical Skills Training

Performed supervised procedures such as patient examination, wound care, and emergency response.

⚡ Medical Academic Coursework

Completed intensive training in anatomy, pharmacology, pathology, microbiology, and clinical medicine.

⚡ Graduation Research

Conducted research in a medical field such as chronic diseases, infectious diseases, or public health topics.
